---
pagetitle: "CV"
description: "Curriculum Vitae for John Severini."
image: images/headshot.jpg
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.page-banner}
![](images/banner.png)

[CV]{.banner-title}
:::

::: {.page-content .cv-centered}
For the most recent copy of my CV, click here:

**[Curriculum Vitae](files/John_Severini - CV - 2026-03-12.pdf)**

Updated as of March 12, 2026
:::
